creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Dominic Fandrey wrote on 21.03.2012 02:40:
>   Ladies and genlemen, I proudly present, libbluray 0.2.2.
>
>   It /still/ depends on ports/166223 and it still should be applied with
>   "patch -E".

Dominic, please let's wait a little for libbluray upstream response (I 
added you to cc: ).

>
>   Along the way, let's update some dependencies on the way.
>
>   Am I the only one finding it ironic that vlc comes without libbluray
>   support in the ports?

I'd suggest that you open new pr with request for adding lubbluray 
dependency to multimedia/vlc, so that Joseph will be aware about this.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
